items.title: Trump tariffs upend one entrepreneur's 'American dream' | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>As Trump's new tariffs came into effect, China hit back saying 'the market has spoken'. But those bearing the immediate brunt are entrepreneurs like Camden Hauge, who say they are just trying to 'live the American dream'.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #trump #tariffs #useconomy

items.title: Death toll rises as Myanmar continues search for quake survivors | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A devastating earthquake struck Myanmar on March 28, resulting in a death toll of 3,354. Additionally, 4,850 people were injured and another 220 are missing.

items.title: Trump's tariffs compound the pain in France's cognac industry | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Christophe Fillioux's family estate in the cognac region of southwest France has survived for five generations. But after the latest tariffs announced by the US President Donald Trump, Fillioux is starting to tear up some of the vines by the roots.

#donaldtrump #trumptariffs #cognac #france #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Take a boat ride with Reuters breaking news editor Alasdair Pal to Sydney's Manly Beach, join him for a game of Aussie rules football, and grab a bite to-go at the Lakemba night market.
 
#sydney #australia #beach #afl #lakemba #travel</article>

items.title: RFK Jr's cuts to US health
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to streamline what he calls a bloated health bureaucracy. Job cuts at the FDA, CDC and NIH this week saw pharma stocks drop and raised concerns about the country's readiness to fight health threats like the measles outbreak. On this episode of Reuters World News, health editors Michele Gershberg and Caroline Humer explain what we know about the cuts, and how the industry is reacting to moves by Trump’s health czar.


 


Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices (https://megaphone.fm/adchoices)</article>

items.content:

items.title: LIVE: Canada's Mark Carney tours an auto plant after Trump tariffs
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney tours an auto-manufacturing facility following U.S. President Donald Trump’s tariffs announcement. Carney announced a limited set of counter-measures against U.S. tariffs while calling Trump's protectionist moves a tragedy for global trade. Last month, Carney called a snap election for April 28, saying he needed a strong mandate to deal with the threat posed by Trump, who "wants to break us so America can own us."

#canada #tariffs #trump #Carney #markcarney #globalmarkets #live #news #reuters

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: LIVE: Wall Street opens sharply lower after China's retaliatory tariffs
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>U.S. stocks opened sharply lower, with the Nasdaq Composite heading into a bear market, after China imposed fresh tariffs on all U.S. goods in response to the Trump administration's sweeping levies, escalating a global trade war.
 
#Tariffs #Markets #Stocks #NYSE #Trade #Economy #Live #Reuters #News

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: Fed's Powell says Trump's tariffs likely to boost inflation, slow growth | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>'We face a highly uncertain outlook with elevated risks of both higher unemployment and higher inflation,' Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said in remarks that pointed to the potentially difficult set of decisions ahead for the US central bank.
